review: Great fade cut! Emily was very skilled and took the time to ensure everything was perfect. Would recommend her to anyone looking for a clean fade.
Jane is amazing! She gave me the perfect layered cut and took extra care to listen to what I wanted. The layers look so natural and I'm very happy with the result.
Good buzz cut, but the shave could have been a bit sharper. Mike was friendly, though, and the cut was quick. Not bad for the price.
Robert did a solid job on my crew cut. The fade was clean, and he was very detailed with the edges. I’ll definitely be coming back for my next cut.
John gave me the best bob cut I've ever had! He was very precise and took his time to make sure everything was even. Absolutely love the style and how it frames my face.
I’m a big fan of my new pompadour. Robert did a great job styling it, and it looks fantastic. My only complaint is that it took a bit longer than expected.
I absolutely love my pixie cut! Emily was so kind and made sure to give me exactly what I asked for. She even showed me how to style it at home. Highly recommended!
Mike gave me a decent undercut, but I felt the fade wasn’t as sharp as I would’ve liked. Overall, it’s not bad, just not exactly what I envisioned.
Jane absolutely nailed the shag cut! It’s exactly what I wanted, and she styled it in a way that complements my face shape. Very professional and skilled. Highly recommend her services.
Taper cut was good, but I think Emily could have spent a bit more time on the detailing. Still happy with the outcome though, and I’ll probably return.
